channel.title: White Chocolate Mocha on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in White Chocolate Mocha on Barista At Home

item.title: White Chocolate Mocha Recipe (Starbucks Copycat — Hot & Iced)
item.description: Make a white chocolate mocha at home with homemade white chocolate sauce, espresso, and steamed milk. Better than Starbucks — and a fraction of the price.
